Jasminder Gill; Pacific Coast Injury Law Center; 213-457-3974; appearing as counsel for plaintiff Tyee Kyvelos.

Not contested. The court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

ATTORNEY'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL (RE: PLAINTIFF TYEE KYVELOS) is DENIED without prejudice. Declaration is support of the motion indicates in paragraph 3(a)(a) that the client was served by mail at the client's last known address with copies of the motion papers served with this declaration, there is no complete proof of service on file regarding this mailing.
